originalTitle: Fed watching is looking very different now. Two charts can help you in the Warsh era.
summary: Kevin Warsh is forcing Wall Street to do the heavy lifting. Use these benchmarks to find your footing.
content: Kevin Warsh is forcing Wall Street to do the heavy lifting. Use these benchmarks to find your footing.
chineseTitle: 美联储的观察现在看起来非常不同。两张图表可以在沃什时代为您提供帮助。
chineseSummary: 凯文·沃什正在迫使华尔街承担重任。使用这些基准来找到你的立足点。
chineseContent: 凯文·沃什正在迫使华尔街承担重任。使用这些基准来找到你的立足点。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
